items.summary: Building production ML pipelines for real-time inference and computer vision at scale.
description: Leading the design and deployment of real-time inference pipelines serving low-latency vision models. Owning the path from research prototypes to monitored production systems.
Established evaluation harnesses and CI for model quality, cutting regression-ship time from days to hours.
bullets: Shipped a real-time inference pipeline with 120ms p95 latency serving 3.2× throughput over the previous system.
Built an automated evaluation and CI harness that cut model regression ship time from days to hours.
Mentored two interns on MLOps best practices and reproducible training environments.
achievements: Shipped a real-time inference pipeline with 120ms p95 latency serving 3.2× throughput.
Built an automated evaluation harness cutting regression ship time from days to hours.
Mentored two interns on MLOps and reproducible training.

items.summary: Researched transformer architectures and efficient fine-tuning for low-resource NLP.
description: Investigated parameter-efficient fine-tuning methods for transformer models on low-resource language tasks.
Co-authored an internal technical report and presented findings at a university research symposium.
bullets: Researched parameter-efficient fine-tuning, reducing trainable params by 94% with minimal accuracy loss.
Co-authored a technical report on efficient adaptation of transformers for low-resource NLP.
Presented findings at the university research symposium.
achievements: Reduced trainable parameters by 94% via LoRA-style adaptation with minimal accuracy loss.
Co-authored a technical report on efficient transformer adaptation.
Presented at the university research symposium.

items.summary: Built accessible, animated web interfaces and a design-system component library.
description: Developed accessible, animated interfaces and contributed to a shared component library used across client projects.
Improved Lighthouse performance scores from the low 70s to 98+ through code-splitting and image optimization.
bullets: Shipped accessible, animated interfaces for client projects.
Contributed to a shared design-system component library.
Raised Lighthouse performance scores from 72 to 98 via optimization.
achievements: Contributed to a shared design-system library.
Raised Lighthouse performance scores from 72 to 98.

items.summary: Undergraduate studies focused on artificial intelligence, ML systems, and algorithms.
description: Coursework spanning algorithms, operating systems, machine learning, and computer vision with an AI specialization.
Leading a student AI interest group running weekly paper-reading sessions.
bullets: AI specialization with coursework in ML, CV, NLP, and systems.
Lead a student AI interest group with weekly paper-reading sessions.
achievements: AI specialization across ML, CV, NLP, and systems.
Lead a student AI interest group with weekly paper readings.

items.summary: First place for an edge-vision occupancy monitoring system with AI route prediction.
description: Won first place with a team building an edge-vision + GPS platform fusing deep-learning occupancy monitoring with AI route prediction.
The project advanced UN Sustainable Development Goals 9 and 11 around smart infrastructure and sustainable cities.
bullets: First place at the National AI Hackathon.
Built edge-vision occupancy monitoring with AI route prediction.
achievements: Edge-vision occupancy monitoring with AI route prediction.
